_meta.notes: Authored to match D5 script + ag2 adapter request shape. Single prompt 'weather in Tokyo' driving get_weather tool call. The built-in default catchall renderer (copilot-tool-render testid) fires. Assertion checks data-tool-name='get_weather' + status pill testid.

fixtures._comment: default-catchall: weather in Tokyo — follow-up after get_weather tool result. Must come before the tool-emitting fixture (first-match-wins).

response.content: Tokyo is 22°C and partly cloudy — the default catchall renderer displayed the tool card with status pill.

fixtures._comment: default-catchall: weather in Tokyo — emit get_weather tool call. The built-in default renderer (copilot-tool-render testid) fires because no per-tool renderer is registered.
